overall.description: Night driving through an industrial corridor in a futuristic city, transitioning from under a metal truss overpass to an open highway flanked by solar panel arrays. The scene features Cyberpunk 2077's signature aesthetic with teal night skies, warm artificial lighting, and a distant red neon sign.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial highway underpass with metal truss overhead

events.description: exits the covered truss overpass into the open highway between solar farms

agents.ego_description: driving forward under the industrial overpass, approaching the open highway exit

entered.detail: large rusted metal truss bridge structure spanning the road overhead with support beams
illuminated yellow rectangular sign with black numbers 015 mounted on the truss
silver metal guardrail running along the right edge of the asphalt road

segments.scene_description: Driving under a massive rusted metal truss overpass on an industrial highway at night. The camera moves steadily forward beneath artificial lighting, with a yellow highway sign visible on the right, approaching the open exit where solar panel arrays become visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open industrial highway flanked by solar panel farms

agents.ego_description: cruising down the empty highway between solar panel arrays, approaching the red neon sign in the distance

notable_agents.action: flying vehicle hovering and moving slowly in the night sky ahead, descending slightly as the camera approaches

entered.detail: extensive rows of large tilted solar panels extending into the distance on the left side of the highway
extensive rows of large tilted solar panels extending into the distance on the right side of the highway
tall industrial structure with bright red glowing neon signage visible far down the road
wooden utility poles with overhead power lines running parallel to the road on the left side

segments.scene_description: Cruising down an open multi-lane highway flanked by extensive solar panel farms on both sides under a clear night sky. The camera advances toward a distant red neon sign while power lines run parallel on the left, and a flying vehicle hovers in the sky ahead, gradually getting closer as the drive continues.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward drive that transitions from the oppressive enclosure of an industrial overpass into a vast, open highway landscape. It begins beneath a massive rusted metal truss, moving steadily under artificial lights past a yellow highway sign toward a brightening exit. As the camera emerges from the structure, the environment expands into a multi-lane highway flanked by extensive solar panel farms under a clear night sky. The scene then advances parallel to power lines, drawing closer to a hovering flying vehicle and a distant red neon sign that glows on the horizon.
